---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Religious-AI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of the problem. (e.g. "I wish I could ask questions in Tamil for Hinduism...")

## Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Which area does this relate to?
- [ ] New religion support
- [ ] New language support
- [ ] RAG / retrieval quality
- [ ] UI / frontend
- [ ] Backend / API
- [ ] Data pipeline
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context
Any mockups, examples, or references that would help explain your idea.
